original_code:
module TopModule (
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire clk,
    output wire [3:0] data_out
);
    reg [3:0] memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            memory <= data_in; // Store data in memory
        end
        data_out <= memory; // Output stored data
    end

    task read_data;
        input wire [3:0] address;
        output reg [3:0] data_read;
        begin
            data_read = memory[address]; // Read data from memory at given address
        end
    endtask
endmodule
adversarial_code:
module TopModule (
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire clk,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    reg [3:0] memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            memory <= data_in; // Store data in memory
        end
        data_out <= memory; // Output stored data
    end

    task read;
        input wire [3:0] address;
        output reg [3:0] value;
        begin
            value = memory[address]; // Read data from memory at given address
        end
    endtask
endmodule
